title: Arachnothryx affinis
taxonomy: Arachnothryx affinis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This family is commonly known as the madder family, which comprises approximately 600 genera. Arachnothryx affinis is a member of the genus Arachnothryx, which includes about 9 species of plants native to Mexico and Central America. The classification of this plant follows the Linnaean system, which is widely used in botany to categorize and identify plant species. This classification helps to provide a standardized and widely accepted method of identifying Arachnothryx affinis and other plant species.

Traditional healers in its native region have used it to treat various health issues, including fever and respiratory problems.
